form.formComment: Improved two runs back to score then won again last start over 400m at Geelong (22.95), beating Paw Vancouver. In top form and can make it three straight.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Improved two runs back to score then won again last start over 400m at Geelong (22.95), beating Paw Vancouver. In top form and can make it three straight.

form.formComment: Was sent out long odds last time but charged out of the boxes with a fast early sectional and gave a sight before being swallowed up late, finishing a 2.5 lengths sixth (22.51) over 390m at this track. Has the ability to take this out.

formComments.title: TAB

form.formComment: Most recent effort finished last on April 7 over 410m at Horsham behind Super Symon beaten 16 lengths (24.66) in a Grade 5. Ignore last start. Has ability and can feature in the finish.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Checked on turn off back straight.

form.formComment: Hit the frame latest (22.60) when second at this track in a Rank Limit - Grade 5. Fairly consistent record from the draw including a win and seven minors. Looks suited and should go close.

form.formComment: Missed the frame latest (22.60) when eighth over 390m at this track in a Grade 5. Still a maiden from the draw but has placed four times. Others rate better this time.

form.formComment: Missed the frame last time but was in the minors two on end prior to that, the most recent when second (19.61) at big odds over 350m at Healesville. Drawn out wide and looks a each way chance only this field.

form.formComment: Has been out of the money of late. Could only manage eighth last time out over 390m at this track. Needs to find a bit more to test these.

form.formComment: Missed the frame last start when fourth and beaten 6 lengths at this track. Form solid prior to that including a win at this track three back. Could pose a serious challenge if finds best this time.
